---
title: "IPCW Model - Novel GLP1s vs other classes"
author: "Gwen Aubrac"
date: today
format: html
embed-resources: true
---

## Overview

Define study end date, define treatment discontinuation and switch based on censoring dates from program 3b (Stata), and fit IPCW models.
- Describe overall switching rates and switching patterns (from which to which drug/class)
- Separate IPCW model for censoring due to switch and censoring due to discontinuation
- Describe mean time to censoring due to discontinuation or switch
- Describe IPCW weights overall and by treatment group (important to identify any extreme weights/positivity violations)

```{r}
#| label: compute-ipcw
#### IPCW WEIGHTS ####

library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(haven)
library(lubridate)
library(huxtable)
library(broom)


end_date <- ymd(Sys.getenv("STUDY_END", unset = "2025-12-31"))

project_root <- Sys.getenv("PROJECT_ROOT")
if (nchar(project_root) == 0) stop("PROJECT_ROOT is not set. To run this file directly in an R session, source code/00-setup.R first in the same session (it loads .Renviron). Otherwise launch the full pipeline via run_all.R / run_all.command / run_all.bat.")
output_dir      <- Sys.getenv("OUTPUT_DIR",      unset = file.path(project_root, "output"))
main_output_dir <- Sys.getenv("MAIN_OUTPUT_DIR", unset = output_dir)
results_dir <- Sys.getenv("RESULTS_DIR", unset = file.path(project_root, "results", "main"))
out_path <- function(name) {
  p <- normalizePath(file.path(output_dir, name), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  if (file.exists(p)) return(p)
  normalizePath(file.path(main_output_dir, name), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

# create directory to save results in
dir.create(results_dir, recursive = TRUE)

disc_date   <- read_dta(out_path("disc_date_novel.dta"))
switch_date <- read_dta(out_path("switch_date_novel.dta"))

data <- readRDS(out_path("clean_novel.rds"))

data <- data %>%
  left_join(disc_date, by = "PATIENT_ID") %>%
  left_join(switch_date, by = "PATIENT_ID")

cov_list <- readRDS(out_path("cov_list_novel.rds"))
cov_list

# define discontinuation flag
# disc = 1 if discontinuation was prior to any other censoring events

# patients who, if they had a switch date, discontinue before switching
test <- data %>%
  select(c(PATIENT_ID, index_date, switch_date, disc_date)) %>%
  filter(is.na(switch_date) | (!is.na(switch_date) & disc_date < switch_date))

# patients who, if they have a dod date, discontinue before dod
test <- data %>%
  select(PATIENT_ID, index_date, dod, disc_date) %>%
  filter(is.na(dod) | (!is.na(dod) & disc_date < dod))


# disc flag: if disc occurred prior to switch, dod, and study end
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    disc = if_else(!is.na(disc_date) &
                     (is.na(switch_date) | (!is.na(switch_date) & disc_date < switch_date)) &
                     (is.na(dod) | (!is.na(dod) & disc_date < dod)) &
                     disc_date < end_date
                   ,1, 0)
  )

table(data$disc)

test <- data %>%
  select(PATIENT_ID, index_date, disc_date, switch_date, dod, disc)

# define switch flag: if switch occurred prior to disc, dod, and study end
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    switch = if_else(!is.na(switch_date) &
                     (is.na(disc_date) | (!is.na(disc_date) & switch_date < disc_date)) &
                     (is.na(dod) | (!is.na(dod) & switch_date < dod)) &
                     switch_date < end_date
                   ,1, 0)
  )

table(data$switch)

# switch types: among people who switched before other censoring events
data %<>%
  mutate(switch_type = if_else(switch == 1, switch_type, NA))

library(gtsummary)
library(dplyr)

# Persist the prepared inputs so 15b can run independently. 15b loads
# `data` (with disc/switch flags and switch_type cleaned) and reuses the
# same cov_list_novel.rds that was loaded above.
saveRDS(data, file.path(output_dir, "ipcw_input_novel.rds"))

# 15b is a separate .R file because of issues with sink() to save the model outputs
```
